_doc: Launch original sectional — Calendar. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: If today is Monday, what day will it be after 45 days?
questions.stem_hi: यदि आज Monday है, तो 45 days बाद कौन सा day होगा?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Counted today as day 1 and shifted one extra day. After 45 days means add 45 mod 7.
options.trap_reason_hi: आज को day 1 count करके एक extra day shift कर दिया। 45 days बाद का मतलब 45 mod 7 add करना है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Reduced 45 by 7 incorrectly and moved two days too far.
options.trap_reason_hi: 45 को 7 से गलत reduce किया और two days आगे चले गए।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Assumed the same day repeats without checking 45 mod 7. Same day occurs only if remainder is 0.
options.trap_reason_hi: 45 mod 7 check किए बिना same day मान लिया। Same day तभी होगा जब remainder 0 हो।

questions.explanation_method_en: 45 mod 7 = 3. Move 3 days from Monday; the day is Thursday. Therefore, answer = Thursday.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Calendar days repeat every 7 days. The remainder on division by 7 gives the effective shift from the starting day. Final answer is Thursday.
questions.explanation_method_hi: 45 mod 7 = 3। Monday से 3 days आगे बढ़ें; day Thursday होगा। अतः answer = Thursday।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Calendar days हर 7 days में repeat होते हैं। 7 से remainder effective shift बताता है। Final answer Thursday है।

questions.stem_en: Is 2024 a leap year?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Ignored the century rule. Century years must be divisible by 400; other years divisible by 4 are leap years.
options.trap_reason_hi: Century rule ignore किया। Century years 400 से divisible होने चाहिए; बाकी 4 से divisible years leap होते हैं।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Treated a standard Gregorian leap-year rule as missing data. The year alone is sufficient.
options.trap_reason_hi: Gregorian leap-year rule के लिए extra data माँगा। Year alone sufficient है।

options.label: D
options.text_en: Only if February has 29 days in the given calendar
options.text_hi: Only if February has 29 days in the given calendar
options.trap_reason_en: Restated the consequence instead of applying the divisibility rule.
options.trap_reason_hi: Rule apply करने की जगह consequence बोल दिया।

questions.explanation_method_en: 2024 is not a century year, so check divisibility by 4: remainder 0. Result: Leap year. Therefore, answer = Leap year.
questions.explanation_concept_en: In the Gregorian calendar, leap years are divisible by 4, but century years must be divisible by 400. This exception removes three leap days every 400 years. Final answer is Leap year.
questions.explanation_method_hi: 2024 century year नहीं है, इसलिए 4 से divisibility check करें: remainder 0. Result: Leap year. अतः answer = Leap year।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Gregorian calendar में leap year 4 से divisible होता है, लेकिन century year को 400 से divisible होना चाहिए। Final answer Leap year है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Use odd days for completed years, completed months, and date 25; reducing the total modulo 7 gives Saturday. Therefore, answer = Saturday.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Every block of seven days returns to the same weekday. Calendar questions reduce the total elapsed odd days modulo seven. Final answer is Saturday.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Completed years, months और date 25 के odd days जोड़ें; total को mod 7 करने पर Saturday मिलता है। अतः answer = Saturday।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: हर 7 days के बाद same weekday आता है। Calendar questions elapsed odd days को modulo 7 reduce करते हैं। Final answer Saturday है।
